name: Center Ring
flavor: You strut into view, arms wide, painted grin blazing: "Me! Look at ME!" — and, gods help them, they do.
description: You call one creature you can see within range into the spotlight, and it can't help but oblige. The target makes a Wisdom saving throw against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}}. On a failure, until the start of your next turn the target must target you with its next attack, spell, or other harmful single-target effect, if you are a legal target for it. If you are not a legal target when it acts, the effect simply lapses for that action. A creature that succeeds on the save is unaffected, and a creature immune to being charmed automatically succeeds.
sheetSummary: Bonus action, 60 ft, cooldown 3. Wis save vs trick save DC. Fail: target must direct its next single-target attack or spell at you (if you're a legal target) before the start of your next turn. Charm-immune creatures auto-succeed.
